sections.text: The following data is from the MSAJCE Computer Science and Engineering Contact table: The address is 34, Rajiv Gandhi Salai (OMR), Siruseri IT Park, Siruseri, Chennai – 603103, the phone number is +91 99400 04500, the email is msajce.office@gmail.com, and the grievance email is grievance@msajce-edu.in. The website is www.msjce-edu.in and the online application link is enrollonline.co.in/Registration/Apply/MSAJCE.
